properties.name: yas.observability.enabled
properties.description: Master kill-switch. Set to false to completely disable the YAS observability starter.

properties.name: yas.observability.log-export-enabled
properties.description: Whether to install the OpenTelemetry Logback appender and export logs via OTLP.

properties.name: yas.observability.service-namespace
properties.description: OTel resource attribute service.namespace applied to all telemetry from this service.
